friendly_name: Canonical Producer Contracts and Legacy Envelope Compatibility
purpose_context: spec-kitty-events is the single source of truth for SaaS-bound event contracts. Today, validate_event() does not call validate_transition() on WPStatusChanged, seven CLI-emitted event types have no published contracts, and there is no canonical legacy-envelope normalization surface. Without closing these gaps, Phase 2 (CLI canonical producer refactor) cannot be enforced and Phase 3 (SaaS explicit legacy normalization) cannot replace the silent strict-envelope carve-out. This mission ships the contracts so the next two phases can land safely.
purpose_tldr: Close the conformance and legacy-envelope gaps that block the CLI producer refactor and SaaS legacy adapter.
